changes.reason: Distinct Mac App launch-security symptom cluster supported by current China Mainland Chinese Apple documentation.

queries: Apple 无法检查恶意软件
canonicalReview.notes: Reviewed all 74 canonical articles by title, summary, symptoms, aliases, devices, platforms, error messages, keywords, and full-text matches. Existing Mac articles cover startup, login password, camera, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, mail, printer, storage, display, firmware, and Apple Watch unlock; iPhone/iPad App articles cover crashes and App Store issues. No article covers macOS Gatekeeper/source-signature/notarization/damaged-App launch warnings as the primary intent.
